description: Append-only schedule forecasts for the Populace dynamics DynaSim-replacement campaign. Rules in docs/forecasts/README.md. Not part of the gates.yaml evaluation contract.

entries.retro_note: Original tiered estimate was given in-session on 2026-07-16/17 before this ledger existed; entered here verbatim-in-substance at ledger creation and immediately superseded by entries 2-4. Kept so the revision trail starts at the true first estimate.
entries.claim: Tiered: certified projection engine in days-to-a-week; policy-useful SS estimates in ~2-3 weeks; full DynaSim parity in 4-7 weeks (from ~2026-07-16).
entries.resolution_criterion: Superseded before resolution; graded via the criteria of entries 2-4.

entries.claim: Certified projection engine: a registered gate_m6 candidate run scores PASS on the 11-cell temporal holdout (>=4-of-5 seeds per the locked contract).
entries.resolution_criterion: A scored verdict artifact in runs/ for a registered candidate, published via merged PR, with overall PASS under the live gate_m6 contract.
entries.revision_reason: Evidence since entry 1: floors v4 locked (#237) and round-2 plan ratified (#234) same-day; 5/11 cells already passing with regression constraints; earnings fix fully designed (amendment 4) with q* selection ~7h into compute. Against that: the round-2 selector execution defect (#238) added a full amendment/refreeze/rerun loop (~1 day) on the blocking remarriage path, and machine contention cost ~half a day.

entries.claim: First DynaSim-style SS estimates: end-to-end benefit and revenue estimates computed on projected earnings/demographic histories from the certified engine, published in-repo with disclosed gaps (no immigration, pre-alignment acceptable).
entries.resolution_criterion: A merged PR publishing benefit + revenue estimate tables/analysis derived from a certified-engine projection (statutory AIME/PIA oracle applied to projected histories), explicitly labeled with its disclosed gaps.
entries.revision_reason: Component inventory is stronger than entry 1 assumed: AIME/PIA oracle, claiming-age, differential mortality, disability, and the M2 revenue/balance analogue are already built and gated; remaining work after certification is assembly plus the M7 factory ceremony (~1 week).

entries.claim: Full-parity SS estimates: immigration and alignment integrated into the certified pipeline (pensions/wealth/LTSS explicitly out of scope pending a separate scoping decision).
entries.resolution_criterion: Merged PRs integrating an immigration module and target alignment into the estimate pipeline, with refreshed published estimates superseding the entry-3 gapped release.
entries.revision_reason: Carried from entry 1's 4-7 week band, narrowed by observed ceremony velocity (three ratifications on 2026-07-17) and the existing immigration design brief.

entries.claim: Registration 8 (M6 candidate 2) is submitted on issue #42 - i.e., all three preconditions cleared: floors v4 (done), the amendment-4 q* lock addendum ratified, and the remarriage designed pause resolved through the round-3 path.
entries.resolution_criterion: A registration comment for candidate 2 posted on issue #42 naming runs/gate_m6_candidate2_v1.json, per the one-shot write_new convention.

resolution.note: Superseded entry graded against reality per the ledger rules: resolved exactly on its original p50 date. The revision (entry 6) moved p50 a day later on the governance-ladder discovery; reality landed on the original date.

entries.claim: Registration 8 (M6 candidate 2) is submitted on issue #42 - i.e., all three preconditions cleared: floors v4 (done), the amendment-4 q* lock addendum ratified, and the remarriage designed pause resolved through the round-3 path.
entries.resolution_criterion: A registration comment for candidate 2 posted on issue #42 naming runs/gate_m6_candidate2_v1.json, per the one-shot write_new convention.
entries.revision_reason: The remarriage train-only ladder completed as a RATIFIED no-op (#247, after the round-3..6 reducer ceremony chain), but the ratified plan's frozen no-op ladder (learning_plan_round2.md section 7) keeps the designed pause ACTIVE and the program's section 9.3 registration condition forbids registration under that disposition. Registration 8 now additionally requires either the decision-9 re-adjudication ceremony or the W1-style surface-question disposition (both proposals launched 07-18). qstar2 also slowed under host contention (uneven 17-64 min/rung). Net: p50 moves 07-19 -> 07-20.

entries.claim: Certified projection engine: a registered gate_m6 candidate run scores PASS on the 11-cell temporal holdout (>=4-of-5 seeds per the locked contract).
entries.resolution_criterion: A scored verdict artifact in runs/ for a registered candidate, published via merged PR, with overall PASS under the live gate_m6 contract.
entries.revision_reason: The ratified condition-5 conformance measurement (#251, merged e147fa7) puts the post-repair remarriage.18-64 residual transport at 111.5%/125.4%/192.7% of the unchanged 0.403 tolerance at train boundaries 2006/2008/2010 - decisively worse than the 105.8% band the R disposition was adjudicated on, and trending worse toward the scored window. Candidate 2 is therefore modal-FAIL on the 11-cell conjunction; its run (still proceeding under R, with the new numbers in the candid forecast) primarily buys scored validation of the two new deltas plus decisive surface-question evidence. A PASS most likely requires the remarriage surface ceremony (#249 lane) plus a candidate 3. p50 therefore moves 07-22 -> 07-25.

entries.claim: First DynaSim-style SS estimates: end-to-end benefit and revenue estimates computed on projected earnings/demographic histories from the certified engine, published in-repo with disclosed gaps (no immigration, pre-alignment acceptable).
entries.resolution_criterion: A merged PR publishing benefit + revenue estimate tables/analysis derived from a certified-engine projection (statutory AIME/PIA oracle applied to projected histories), explicitly labeled with its disclosed gaps.
entries.revision_reason: Downstream of entry 7's certification shift (candidate-3-after-surface-ceremony now the modal certification path).

entries.claim: Certified projection engine: a registered gate_m6 candidate run scores PASS on the 11-cell temporal holdout (>=4-of-5 seeds per the locked contract).
entries.resolution_criterion: A scored verdict artifact in runs/ for a registered candidate, published via merged PR, with overall PASS under the live gate_m6 contract.
entries.revision_reason: The candidate-3 pipeline advanced far faster than the entry-7 modal path assumed (program #270, diagnostic #271, amendment 6 #272 all ratified within ~30h of the candidate-2 verdict; prototype #273 implemented with all preflights green), but the rho-selection ladder consumed the schedule margin: measured pace is ~2h/rung x 17 rungs (~36h sealed run) vs the ~7h q*-ladder precedent, and the first attempt livelocked after 7h39m in an OpenMP join barrier (stack-sampled; permanent), with the restart then catching a fitting-stack HEAD drift from a concurrent lane (guard worked; resolved by a lane-local clone pinned at ee8f7fc1). Hardened attempt 2 launched 2026-07-22 ~12:20 ET puts the ledger at ~00:30 7/24, registration + 23h run on 7/24, verdict ~7/25, and refereed certification 7/25 only if every remaining step lands first-try. With ladder-recurrence risk and the amendment's F1-unresolved-by-design uncertainty, the median certification lands 7/26. p50 7/25 -> 7/26; p80 7/29 -> 7/30.
